notes: Deduplicated parsed skills in parse_skills() to prevent recommendation score inflation.
Added input type and value validation to validate_recommendation_inputs() to prevent unhandled ValueError/AttributeError 500 crashes.
Added regression tests asserting that all projects in data/projects.json have unique IDs and titles.
Added display: inline-block and white-space: nowrap to skill strip items in style.css to prevent mobile overflows.
Fixed clear/reset filter event handling by ensuring unique button IDs and syncing JavaScript form reset calls.
Fixed raw JSON formatting on skill chips when hydrated from localStorage.
Corrected mismatched closing tag with tag for the navbar search form in index.html.
Removed duplicate paragraph and button/link within the Starter Code Included feature card in index.html.
Added form-actions layout container and styled btn-clear to match the submit button height, enabling mobile-stacked responsiveness.
Added body.dark-theme class toggling in script.js and inline script to enable dark mode styles throughout the application.
Fixed text contrast for feature card links in dark mode.
Fixed early-closing form tag to restore correct vertical flex alignment inside navbar.
Added relevance threshold in get_recommendations() and updated pytest test case to verify empty results on unrelated skills.
Corrected the unclosed form tag in index.html to prevent the mobile hamburger button from performing an implicit form submit.

Synchronized body.dark-theme class toggling in script.js and theme_head.html, updated SVG classes to icon-sun/icon-moon in partial, hid desktop links (.nav-links) on mobile, and added homepage desktop theme toggle.
Added collapsible details to roadmap steps in project.html, populated descriptions in script.js on load, and locked the completion button until all checkboxes are checked.
Added query parameter encoding on form submit success, and query parsing/form auto-submit on page load to restore recommendations state.
